$comment: C11/C23 6.7.5 (D-CSUBSET-ALIGNAS-VARIABLE-CODEGEN, #2 arm64 per-alloca fix): TWO alignas(16) stack locals preceded by a `char pad` local. Each must be 16-byte aligned at runtime. On arm64 the frame slot width is 8 (< the 16-byte stack alignment), so a non-first over-aligned local lands 8-aligned without the per-alloca alignUp — the exact gap this closes (x86_64 is safe: slot width 16). A runtime check masks BOTH &x and &y; exit = 42. Red-on-disable: revert the per-alloca alignUp in computeFrameLayout + the callconv precompute/materialize and the arm64/qemu leg returns 1. One exit code across all four targets incl. the shipped release pipeline.
